switch pAddress.pointee.Address.lpSockaddr.pointee.sa_family {
case ADDRESS_FAMILY(AF_INET):
    self.netmask = SocketAddress(ipv4MaskForPrefix: Int(pAddress.pointee.OnLinkPrefixLength))
    self.interfaceIndex = Int(pAdapter.pointee.IfIndex)
    break
case ADDRESS_FAMILY(AF_INET6):
    self.netmask = SocketAddress(ipv6MaskForPrefix: Int(pAddress.pointee.OnLinkPrefixLength))
    self.interfaceIndex = Int(pAdapter.pointee.Ipv6IfIndex)
    break
default:
    return nil
}

switch self {
case .v4(let addr):
    var mutAddr = addr.address
    mutAddr.sin_port = in_port_t(newValue ?? 0).bigEndian
    self = .v4(.init(address: mutAddr, host: addr.host))
case .v6(let addr):
    var mutAddr = addr.address
    mutAddr.sin6_port = in_port_t(newValue ?? 0).bigEndian
    self = .v6(.init(address: mutAddr, host: addr.host))
case .unixDomainSocket:
    precondition(newValue == nil, "attempting to set a non-nil value to a unix socket is not valid")
}

switch T.self {
case let t where t == ByteBuffer.self:
    return self.forceAsByteBuffer() as! T
case let t where t == FileRegion.self:
    return self.forceAsFileRegion() as! T
case let t where t == IOData.self:
    return self.forceAsIOData() as! T
case let t where t == AddressedEnvelope<ByteBuffer>.self:
    return self.forceAsByteEnvelope() as! T
default:
    return self.forceAsOther(type: type)
}

switch T.self {
case let t where t == ByteBuffer.self:
    return self.tryAsByteBuffer() as! T?
case let t where t == FileRegion.self:
    return self.tryAsFileRegion() as! T?
case let t where t == IOData.self:
    return self.tryAsIOData() as! T?
case let t where t == AddressedEnvelope<ByteBuffer>.self:
    return self.tryAsByteEnvelope() as! T?
default:
    return self.tryAsOther(type: type)
}

switch size {
case 0...125:
    data.writeInteger(UInt8(0x81))
    data.writeInteger(UInt8(size) | maskBitMask)
case 126...Int(UInt16.max):
    data.writeInteger(UInt8(0x81))
    data.writeInteger(UInt8(126) | maskBitMask)
    data.writeInteger(UInt16(size))
default:
    data.writeInteger(UInt8(0x81))
    data.writeInteger(UInt8(127) | maskBitMask)
    data.writeInteger(UInt64(size))
}
